POTATO & CHEESE PIEROGI
 COOKING INSTRUCTIONS:
For best results thaw frozen pierogi before preparing. Cook Thoroughly-For food safety and quality. Heat to a minimum internal temperature of 165° F.
Do Not Re-freeze.
 FOR BEST QUALITY: If frozen, thaw Pierogi. Preheat skillet with 4-5 tbsp. of butter or oil. Place Pierogi in a skillet and reduce heat to low. Turn occasionally until golden brown. IMPORTANT: HIGH HEAT TOUGHENS THE DOUGH
 To Boil: Heat 3 to 4 quarts of water to boil (add 1 tbsp of salt, if desired). Add Pierogi to pot, stir, and return to boil. Reduce heat to medium and cook 1 to 2 minutes if fresh or 2 to 3 minutes if frozen, or when they rise to the top. Drain. IMPORTANT: Overcooking decreases qr ty.
 Serve Severino's Authentic pierogi of sautéed butter and onions, sour

 TRADITIONAL METHOD:
1. Bring 3/4 cup of water to a boil. 2. Add 1/4 cup Quick Cook Steel Cut Oats. 3. Reduce heat to low, simmer uncovered for 5-7 minutes, stirring regularly. 4. Remove from heat and allow to stand for 1 minute before serving. MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS: 1. Add 34 cup of boiling water to ¼ cup Quick Cook Steel Cut Oats in a deep microwave-safe bowl (leaving room in the bowl for the oats to expand
during cooking).
2. Cook on High for 3 minutes, stir and cook for a further 2-3 minutes. 3. Remove from the microwave and allow to stand for 1 minute before serving. For thicker oatmeal use less water. For thinner oatmeal use more water.

Do not exceed recommended dose.
Not to be used by children under 12, pregnant or breast feeding women, unless advised by a healthcare professional.

 This product is a food supplement and should not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.
 Store at room temperature in dry conditions. Protect from light.

text:
RESEAT ABLE TAB
 Parboiled long grain brown rice
COOKING INSTRUCTIONS: TO HEAT ON THE HOB: Allow 70g rice per person. Add the rice to a pan with 500ml water per 70g rice and stir once. Add salt or other seasoning to taste. Bring to the boil, cover and simmer for 28-30 minutes. Drain in a sieve, rinse with boiling water and serve. Fork through to fluff up.
 TO MICROWAVE: Allow 70g rice per person. Add the rice to a large microwavable bowl with 500ml water per 70g rice and stir once. Cover and vent. Cook on full power for 20 minutes (800W). Leave to stand for 2 minutes. Drain and serve. Fork through to fuff up. For microwaves with different outputs, refer to your handbook and adjus heating times accordingly Do not re-heat. We have given you these cooking instructions as a guide of STORAGE: Store in a cool dry place away from stron

text:
2 Cassolettes filled with scallops* and chopped chanterelle mushrooms - Deep frozen
*Chlamys Zygopatagonica, Argentinian origin (A), Chlamys opercularis, UK (B) or Faroe Islands origin (C), Argopecten purpuratus, Peruvian origin (D), Chlamys islandica, Canadian (E) or Faroe Islands (F) or Islandian origin (G): see letter(s) next to batch number. INGREDIENTS: Water, scallops* 20% (molluscs) (*species and origins; see the letter next to the batch number), chopped chanterelle mushrooms 15,2%, low-fat cream (milk) 13,6%, onions, white wine 6,1% (contains sulphites), whole milk powder, butter (milk), wheat flour (gluten), modified potato starch, garlic, natural flavouring, salt, parsley, pepper. May contain traces of fish and crustacean.
 Information in bold print is intended for people with food allergies or intolerances.. Although every care has been taken to prepare the scallops, pieces of shell may remain.
 COOKING INSTRUCTIONS: In a standard oven: cook from frozen. Preheat your oven to 200°C (gas mark 7) for 10 to 15 minutes. Remove the plastic sleeve and wedge. Place in the middle of the oven and cook for around 20 minutes at 200°C (gas mark 7), depending on the power of your oven. Leave to stand before serving. For best results, follow these recommendations. Do not cook in a microwave oven.
Other information-see the side of the pack.

INGREDIENTS: Water, scallops* 20% (molluscs) (*species and origins; see the letter next to the batch number), chopped chanterelle mushrooms 15,2%, low-fat cream (milk) 13,6%, onions, white wine 6,1% (contains sulphites), whole milk powder, butter (milk), wheat flour (gluten), modified potato starch, garlic, natural flavouring, salt, parsley, pepper. May contain traces of fish and crustacean. Information in bold print is intended for people with food allergies or intolerances.. Although every care has been taken to prepare the scallops, pieces of shell may remain. COOKING INSTRUCTIONS: In a standard oven: cook from frozen. Preheat your oven to 200°C (gas mark 7) for 10 to 15 minutes. Remove the plastic sleeve and wedge. Place in the middle of the oven and cook for around 20 minutes at 200°C (gas mark 7), depending on the power of your oven. Leave to stand before serving. For best results, follow these recommendations. Do not cook in a microwave oven. Other information-see the side of the pack. STO *2 ** up

text:
EN Protein Pizza Dough - gluten free BAKING MIXTURE FOR AN APPROX. 400 g PIZZA DOUGH. INGREDIENTS: almond flour*, golden linseed flour, pumpkin seed flour*, egg white powder, baking agent: sodium bicarbonate, antioxidant: ascorbic acid (vitamin c), pink crystal salt. Can contain singly traces of other peel fruits, oil seeds, peanuts and shell ingredients. (*partially de-oiled)
 PREPARATION: Simply knead the mixture with 250 ml water to a dough. Place the dough on a greased baking tray and spread evenly. Bake in the preheated oven at 200°C for approx. 25 minutes, remove and cover as desired, bake again at 200°C for approx. 7-10 minutes - done.

СО Sliced brown bread with mixed seeds.
Ingredients Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Water, Mixed Seeds (8%) (Brown Linseed, Sunflower Seeds, Golden Linseed, Poppy Seeds), Wheat Bran, Malted Wheat Flakes, Yeast, Malted Barley Flour, Wheat Protein, Sugar, Salt, Emulsifiers (Mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids-Vegetable, Mono- and diacetyl tartaric acid esters of mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids-Vegetable), Millet, Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed, Palm), Palm Fat, Spirit Vinegar, Preservative (Calcium propionate), Flour Treatment Agent (Ascorbic acid). Allergy Advice For allergens, including cereals containing gluten, see ingredients in bold. Also, may contain other gluten containing ingredients (oats, rye).
Home Freezing For best quality, freeze as soon as possible and always within the Best Before date. Best within 1 month of freezing. If freezing a whole loaf, tap it gently on a flat surface before freezing. This helps to separate the slices making it easier to use straight from the freezer.
Storage To keep fresher for longer, store in a cool, dry place - a bread bin or cupboard is ideal.
Caution This bag could cause suffocation, keep away from babies, children and animals.
Packed in UK for Co-op (GB), M60 OAG and Co-op (NI) Unit 27/1, BT38 8PH. www.coop.co.uk/food

SERVINGS
 Chicken breast fillets marinated in lemon juice, coriander, cumin with a sunflower, kalonji and fennel seed crust.
 INGREDIENTS: Chicken breast (86%), rapeseed oil, lemon juice, gram flour, rice flour, coriander leaf, unsalted butter (milk), maize, parsley, sunflower seeds, coriander, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, kalonji seeds, salt, paprika, black pepper, cornflour, garlic purée, lemon zest, ginger, sunflower oil, cardamom, fenugreek, nutmeg, smoked paprika, cinnamon, sea salt, wheat dextrose, clove ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens see ingredients in bold.
 Preparation: Wash hands, all surfaces and utensils after touching raw poultry.
OVEN COOK
CHILLED
GAS 6, 200°C, FAN 180°C
25 mins
Preheat oven. Remove sleeve and film lid. Place the foil tray on a baking tray ensuring fillets are not overlapping in the tray. Cook in the centre of the oven until the juices run clear and there is no pink meat.
 EASTERN
 STORAGE: Keep refrigerated below 4°C. For use by date see front of pack. Packaged in a protective atmosphere.
 Freeze as soon after purchase as possible and within the use by date. Use within one month. Defrost fully before use: do not refreeze once defrosted.
 WARNING: Filleting removes all major bones: small bones may remain.
 Made with chicken from
carefully selected British farms
 UK 9509 EC
 MILD

text:
HOW
 Conventional Oven: Preheat oven to 230°C/450°F/GAS MARK 8
Fan Assisted Oven: Preheat oven to 210°C/410°F
 30 MINS
COOK FROM FROZEN: Once defrosted do not refreeze. All cooking appliances vary, the following is a guideline. TAKE CARE - product will be HOT.
 TO OVEN COOK: Remove all packaging. Spread the Roasties evenly on a baking tray with upturned edges. Place the tray in the centre of a preheated owen and COOK FOR 30 MINUTES until crisp and golden. Turn the Roasties at least once during cooking to ensure an even crispness. Ensure the Roasties are piping hot before serving. Serve immediately.
NOT SUITABLE FOR MICROWAVE COOKING.
 For fan assisted and miniature ovens, refer to manufacturer's handbook for guidelines.
CUT POTATOES COATED IN BATTER AND PREFRIED.

Meat free savoury flavour bites, made with mycoprotein, filled with a mild curry sauce and coated in breadcrumb
 INGREDIENTS: Mycoprotein (40%), Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamine), Sauce Filling (18%) [Rapeseed Oil, Water, Curry Paste (Water, Curry Seasoning (Onion Powder, Turmeric, Rusk (Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamine), Salt, Tomato Powder, Fenugreek, Mustard, Garlic Powder, Rapeseed Oil, Clove, Cayenne Pepper, Leek Extract, Coriander, Fennel, Colour: Plain Caramel; Cumin, Ginger, Flavouring: Turmeric Extract), Spirit Vinegar, Apricot Puree (Apricot, Antioxidant: Ascorbic Acid), Concentrated Apricot Juice, Concentrated Lemon Juice, Ground Coriander, Ground Cumin, Ground Fenugreek, Garam Masala Spice Blend (Coriander, Cinnamon, Black Pepper, Cumin, Ginger, Clove), Salt, Ground Cardamom), Free Range Whole Egg, Free Range Salted Egg Yolk (Egg Yolk, Salt), Sugar, Cornflour], Rapeseed Oil, Textured Wheat Gluten, Onion, Salt, Tapioca Starch, Flavourings, Free Range Egg White Powder, Yeast Extract, Spices (Black Pepper, White Pepper), Yeast, Onion Powder, Gelling Agent: Pectin; Black Pepper Extrac Raising Agent: Ammonium Bicarbonate. ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens, including cereals containing gluten, see ingredients in bold. There have been rare cases of allergic reactions to Quom® products, which contain mycoprotein. Mycoprotein is made with a member of the fungi/mould family. Mycoprotein is high in protein and fibre which may cause intolerance in some people. NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION: (typical values as sold) Per 100g: Energy 1157kJ/277kcal, Fat 15g, of which saturates: 1.5g, Carbohydrate 20g, of which sugars 1.7g, Fibre 3.8g, Protein 13g, Salt 1.4g. Per 3 Bites: Energy 694kJ/166kcal, Fat 9.1g, of which saturates 0.9g, Carbohydrate 12g, of which sugars 1.0g, Fibre 2.3g Protein 7.8g, Salt 0.83g. Serves 3. STORAGE INSTRUCTIONS: Keep refrigerated and use by the date shown on front of pack. Once opened, eat within 24 hours. Not suitable for home freezing as product has been previously frozen.

 This fresh and fruity apple cider vinegar is made in Italy by our artisan producer using cold pressed organic apple juice. The
time-tested power trio of ginger, turmeric and black pepper help to warm the body. Naturally fermented, unpasteurised and unfiltered, it contains the "Mother" culture which creates a cloudy appearance and sediment.
 Perfect for dressings and sauces or take 2 tablespoons with water as a wholesome daily tonic.
Shake well before use.

Add 4 heaped teaspoons (20g) of gravy granules into a measuring jug. Stir with 280ml (½ pint) of boiling water until smooth. This may take up to one minute. For a thicker gravy simply add more granules.
INGREDIENTS
Potato Starch, Palm Oil, Salt, Maltodextrin, Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Hydrolysed Maize Protein, Flavourings (contains Wheat), Colour (Plain Caramel), Barley Malt Extract, Onion Powder, Sage, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithins).
Allergy Advice
For allergens, including cereals containing gluten, see ingredients
in bold.
SERVING SUGGESTION Add to casseroles or stews to thicken
and add rich flavour.
STORAGE
Store in a cool, dry place. Best before end: see lid.
 Sa
 (BAN

text:
Foot Treatment Cre For Normal & Cracked Skin
 A unique MERSEA foot cream for normal & cracked skin is Rich with natural oils, vitamins A, C, D, E, 26 Dead Sea minerals, and Aloe Vera Extract, Penetrates skin layers softening and providing essential vitamins and minerals that protects against and alleviates chapping, cracking and roughness due to dryness, promotes elasticity and restores moisture. The formula is easily absorbed leaving the feet lightly and pleasantly scented. Directions for use: Apply a small amount of cream to the sole of the foot, massage gently until fully absorbed. The cream is recommended for daily use.
 O Crème Traitante Pour Les Pieds
La Crème pour les pieds anti-crevasses MERSEA est unique, elle est composée d'huiles naturelles, de vitamines A, C, D, E, de 26 minéraux de la Mer Morte avec un supplément d'huile d'avocat et d'extrait d'aloé vera. Protège contre les gerçures, es rugosités et les craquelures causées par le dessèchement de la peau et les atténue. La formule est facilement absorbée aissant les pieds légers et onctueusement parfumés. Conseils d'utilisation: Appliquer sur les pieds puis masser en gestes circulaires jusqu'à absorption complète.

MATERIAL NUMBER: 110730
FULLY COOKED PULLED PORK, FROZEN
INGREDIENTS: PORK, WATER, SOYBEAN OIL, DEXTROSE, NATURAL FLAVORS, SEA SALT, SODIUM PHOSPHATES.
 OVEN HEATING INSTRUCTIONS:
1 Begin by temparing product in refrigerator for 24 hours until thawed
2. Once thawed pre heat oven to 350 F for Convection ovens or 375 F for conventional ovens
3. Break up meat evenly into a deep pan and cover with foil
4. Cook, covered for 45 to 60 minutes until meat has reached internal temperature of 165 F as verified by a food thermometer
Tip - If you find the product finishing slightly dry add 1 cup of water to every #5 package of meat, then covering and heating to 165 F as verified by 3
STEAMER HEATING INSTRUCTIONS:
 1. Begin by tempering product in refrigerator for 24 hours until thawed
2. Once thawed, place unopened package in steamer for 30 minutes until meat has reached internal temperature of 165 F as verified by a thermometer All kitchen appliances vary in cooking time and product loads. COOKING GUIDE:
COOK FROM FROZEN. PRODUCT MUST BE THOROUGHLY COKED PRIOR TO CONSUMPTION.
PAITRY
 (Cenk from frozen) Preheat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan, medium heat. Sear Gyoza on one side for 5 minutes. Add 1 cup of water to pan and cover with lid. Steam another 3 minutes or until cooked through. Allow 1 minute to cool.
STEAM
(Cook from frozen) Lightly spray surface of steamer with cooking oil. Steam over boiling water for 6 minutes or untoooked through. Allow 1 minute to cool.
 APPLIANCES VARY CONSIDERABLY. PLEASE ADJUST COOKING TIMES IF NECESSARY.

text:
A cool mix!
NAVEL ORANGE FLAVOURED DRINK MIX
60 g TRIPLE PACK
 INGREDIENTS
Caster sugar, acidity regulators (296, 330, 331), natural flavours, stabiliser (466), natural colours (162, 100), antioxidant (300), sweetener (960).
 DIRECTIONS
1. Pour contents of 1 sachet (60 g) into a large jug. 2. Make up to 1 litre with cold water.
3. Stir well until all the powder has dissolved and serve.
 STORE IN A COOL, DRY PLACE, AWAY FROM DIRECT SUNLIGHT, STORE MADE UP DRINK IN THE REFRIGERATOR AND CONSUME WITHIN 3 DAYS.
